## Safety / Privacy Impact

- [ ] Uses synthetic examples only, or explicitly documents approved non-synthetic handling.
- [ ] Does not add raw private chats, tester messages, or user training data.
- [ ] Does not add analytics SDKs, paywalls, or secret-bearing config.
- [ ] Does not weaken consent gates, safe-output blockers, no-raw-content checks, or restricted-artifact checks.
- [ ] Does not introduce unsafe relationship claims, legal/compliance overclaims, or model-accuracy overclaims.

## Screenshots / Demo Evidence

Required for UI changes. Use synthetic examples only.

## Synthetic-Only Confirmation

- [ ] I did not paste private chats into this PR, issue, screenshot, fixture, log, or doc.
- [ ] Synthetic demo/evaluation examples are clearly marked synthetic.

## ML / Dataset Boundary

- [ ] No new ML training, external datasets, or user/tester training data unless explicitly approved in this PR.

## Closed-Beta Impact

- [ ] No impact
- [ ] Changes gate evidence only
- [ ] Changes release/tester invite readiness docs
- [ ] Requires manual human gate review

## Reviewer Checklist

- [ ] Scope is reviewable.
- [ ] Safety/privacy impact is documented.
- [ ] Raw-content risk is addressed.
- [ ] Public-copy risk is addressed.
- [ ] Required validations ran or skipped checks are justified.
- [ ] Manual gates remain human.
